title: Ubiquiti UACC-AOC-SFP28-30M, AOC cable, 25 Gbps, 30m
description: The active Multi Mode optical cable is used for direct connection of two SFP28 ports with a link speed of 25 Gbps . This ultra-thin (3mm) optical cable is 30 m long but is also available in other variants. The cable is ideal for creating connections between switches or routers that provide 25 Gbps
specsSearch: Optics Fiber type Multi Mode Core diameter [µm] 50/125 (OM4) Format SFP, SFP+, SFP28 Transmission speed 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps, 25 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 850 AOC/DAC cable type Active
